reviews.review_description: Best game ever

reviews.review_title: I wish they could bring back multiplayer
reviews.review_description: I really miss multiplayer because it was less scary but I understand why they couldn't keep the servers up but devs if you are reading this,find a way how to get money,make vip passes and make it where you can buy money but don't make it pay to win
in the discord it is said that the game is shelved or canned meaning discontinued or stopped temporarily
This game was the best of its time I loved playing it with friends its sad that it got discontinued
This game was so peak back then I remember how fun it was but y’all need to add back multiplayer
The game is so peak and fun it just needs multiplayer that's all i ask for please add multiplayer
I can only get to level 2 or 1 alone
I got modraiter

So this was my favorite game but as I've been looking to find what happened to it I found it the games dev had to shut down because they got to popular to the point we're they had to pay for the servers but I promise this game was so good so scary I actually scraped my pants once so I hope the devs can one day bring it back I want to raise money for the devs so if you read this go support bingus

This game was absolutely amazing when it had multiplayer, they can make money on the views, if anything they should add a starter pack and other packs do they can gain money so they can keep the servers up, I had so much fun while playing this game, the scariest was level 2 me and my friend had so much fun while playing it, PLEASE bring it back.
There is never anybody to meet and enjoy the game with, and it gets lonely without anybody to talk to.
peak
I miss it bc it got shut down
dont bother asking to￼ add Multiplayer because they are not going to ￼
I get that it says, "Disclaimer: This game has been discontinued," but you reverted back to the OG version AND advertise multiplayer. So, if there is, can someone help?
Please add multiplayer
yes
A few months ago this game was abandoned servers no longer up but I promise this was the single most best game I miss it so much please keep working on this owners

developer_response.body:
Sorry as we got more popular the developer "Bingus" unfortunately needed to shut down the servers as we were limited to 20 people in the game at once and to get more we would need to pay.
- Protogen (applab manager)

reviews.review_title: Best game before, and now to new game.
reviews.review_description:
It was good before but for the new game I have ideas, like adding a new player model￼ and multi player. And add new maps that was not in the game before.
But still very scary. :) 10/10 or 18.2/20.

I get you’ve changed it but I’m gonna see the new thingy that you made and I’m gonna see if it’s better and if it’s not, I hope you change it back. Don’t let me down.
￼

reviews.review_title: This game used to be my favorite in 2023
reviews.review_description:
I still love it.It's just like the old day was more Better Multiple is gone, but. I hope you.
Could get the game back together ❤️
Why is it discontinued or not anymore because I have not checked but if it’s still discontinued plsss don’t make it discontinued

reviews.review_title: It was the best game ever
reviews.review_description: Honestly I’ve never played a better horror game in my life… ( please bring it back 😭 )
I like the game so much I play it 24 seven every day I like the asylum in the vent but I realize I cannot play multiplayer anymore so I just keep playing single player 😭😭😭￼
I like the game I play it everytime and it's gives me chills at night so that's good right yeaah.. I couldn't sleep
When you’re gonna fix the servers, I really wanna play multiplayer so bad. I know you just finish your word but you’re fixing the multiplay next
Now servers are shutdown sadly but people are making it again it called reload paradox

This truly was my favorite game, and I would speed run with friend all the time. It was just getting really good, and it's really a shame to see it go so early.

REST IN PIECE Primal Paradox
-Spoon

reviews.review_title: It is what it is sadly
reviews.review_description: This is my second and last time commenting on this game this game was different from all the other ones this one was unique and original and they had the perfect sound effects to the monsters to the ambience￼ and I will truly miss this game. Thank you for everything Primal Paradox

Bring back the old stuff back cus me and my friend were going to play in a PRIVATE LOBBY but I wouldn’t go in to a private server and it says single player and multiplayer and of course we picked multiplayer and it said can’t connect to sever no internet which my internet is perfectly fine so it’s a really good game so can you please bring back the old stuff

developer_response.body: Hello, the reason multiplayer won't work is because a lot of people are trying to play the game at the moment, and it takes up the servers, it is not an internet issue, and bringing back the old stuff will not fix it as that had the same issue.

reviews.review_description: I sadly can’t join public lobby’s and I don’t like when I play horror games alone so please fix it
I can't join public servers
The servers are so BAD, I do not recommend playing this game at all, it sucks go play scary baboon or some worse knockoff, this game is NOT worth your time at all.

developer_response.body: Hello, sadly we cannot afford better servers, we apologize for wasting your time, we recommend playing Singleplayer if you want to play the game.

reviews.review_description: I've seen videos about this game and I decided to install it. I did single player and it is very scary. Good game well made. But for some reason, whenever I try and join a multiplayer server, it either doesn't let me join or it gives me a message Saying something like your internet connection is bad or there's something up with the servers. I'm not quite sure what it said I don't remember. If anyone can sole me in on why I can't join And what the message is about?Please do Tell me I am very confused. But it looks like a good game when I am able to play It. I will change the review from a four star two or five star.Please and thank you

When me and my friends were playing this game we came up with an idea or I did That you should add a repellent to the game to get the aggression from the monsters to Transfer to the nearest player and the monsters canno't kill the person that the repellent was used on. The repellent can also be used on the player.That's holding it.It was this would cost a 100 coins.Or dollars whatever you want to call it.We would really like to see this in the game because we only got to level 3.After Dying multiple times but this game is overall very good.And Deserves more recognition and more players. And we would really like to see this implemented into the game for us.And more people to play with.

When I first installed Primal Paradox I thought that it wasn't going to be scary at all. I WAS SO NIEVE. This has to be the most scary gtag horror game I've ever played. This isn't A horror game. This is THE horror game. Also if you want to get to multi player just go into it. If it says something about the Internet not working, just close out of the game and go back in. Keep on doing it until you get in.
This is one of the most scary and fun gorilla tag horror games I’ve ever played
It's a 5 star game, but when u die, u get fully reset, and it's annoying, so I suggest adding checkpoints

This game is really fun and good. multi-player mostly works, and if it doesn't, I know some ways to get a round it. 1. Go back in forth between  multi-player and the error screen for multi-player 2.Restart your game 3.restart your headset 4. Get on and off the game.5.Wait and keep going back and forth between multi-player and the error screen for multi-player. so get comfortable becoming there I'm hoping this helps you, and this took like an hour to write, and I hope this issue gets fixed and  I think that the developer should add donates because it would really help him out you don't understand how hard he worked on it and little timmys don't play single-player mode.
No more public servers 😢
